zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton於1189年之前與Elias De Bolton在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton于1189年之前与Elias De Bolton在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bolton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern England named Bolton (Lancashire, Northumberland, Westmorland, and Yorkshire) or from Boulton in Derbyshire and East Lothian in Scotland, from Old English bothl ‘dwelling, house’ (see Bold 1) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Bold
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): from Middle English bold ‘dwelling-house’ (Old English bold the West Midland and northwestern form of Old English bōthl, bōtl), especially in the sense ‘castle or manor house’ for someone who lived or worked at the main house, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, for example Bold (Lancashire), The Bold in Aston Botterell (Shropshire), Booden Farm in Haughton, Booth in Blithfield, and Bull Bridge in Penkridge (all Staffordshire). Compare Bodle .
English: nickname from Middle English bold, Old English b(e)ald ‘bold, brave, noble’, which in Middle English developed the additional sense ‘arrogant, impudent, shameless’.
English: variant of   Bolt   and possibly a variant of   Bald   2.

nameMeanings.name: Elias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Greek form (used in the New Testament) of the name of the prophet   Elijah .  It is one of a number of Old Testament names which have come back into favour since the latter part of the 20th century.  See also  Ellis .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton married Elias De Bolton before 1189, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton a épousé Elias De Bolton avant 1189, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton hat vor 1189 in England Elias De Bolton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton lei sposato Elias De Bolton prima del 1189, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Boltonは1189年以前にイギリスでElias De Boltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton(은)는 1189년 이전 영국에서 Elias De Bolton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton casou-se com Elias De Bolton antes 1189, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton вышла замуж за человека по имени Elias De Bolton перед 1189 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Elias De Bolton se casó con Elias De Bolton antes de 1189, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.

th.–Deceased: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
